item.description:
Ep. 20:  How To Set Up A Training Week

When do you run a Recovery Run? When do you run a Speed Run? What about a Long Run? Why do you run them when you run them? Is it always the same week after week? Why? Well, get ready to find out because Coach Bennett is going to break... it... down. You'll get a list of things to think about before you set up your weekly schedule and then you'll get insight into how Coach Bennett sets his workouts for athletes each week. Of course, there is so much more to the conversation and to this episode. Coach talks about his trip to Georgia and his run with the Atlanta Run Club. And he also celebrates the special zoom calls he had with World Central Kitchen marathoners and a group of sixteen runners from Mexico City training for fall marathons. You also get a Mindset Minute with the one and only coach tammie of the show up society. Told ya... Episode 20 is a great one. Enjoy! And thank you for listening!

Episode Breakdown
Intro: 00:00
Week That Was: 1:40
How To Set Up A Training Week: 12:50
Mindset Minute: 52:55
Sign Off: 54:00

Cheers!

Coach Bennett

item.description:
Episode 19 - Just Some Great Running Advice

This episode just has some great running advice. Hence the name of the episode. This isn't an exhaustive list... it's just some great running advice. I've got more. This is just some of what I got. I can't give you everything on episode 19. You wouldn't come back for episode 20 and I want you back. And that's not all this episode has! I go over... in detail... the Chicago Marathon weekend... which was awesome. There is also the mail bag AND another Mindful Minute with coach tammie. It's an all around great episode. 

00:00 Intro and Chicago Marathon Weekend Recap
22:15 Just Some Great Running Advice

item.itunes:title: Race Day
item.title: Race Day
item.itunes:summary: Ep. 18 Race Day. Coach Bennett guides you through the 24 hours BEFORE your race. You'll learn how Coach Bennett set up his athletes for the best chance to be successful once they crossed the starting line by making sure everything they did during the day leading up to that starting... set them up top be successful. It's about alarm clocks and dinner plans. It's about reservations and breakfast. It's about packing bags and making checklists. It's about sleeping masks and extra rolls o...
item.description:
Ep. 18 Race Day. 

Coach Bennett guides you through the 24 hours BEFORE your race. You'll learn how Coach Bennett set up his athletes for the best chance to be successful once they crossed the starting line by making sure everything they did during the day leading up to that starting... set them up top be successful.

It's about alarm clocks and dinner plans. It's about reservations and breakfast. It's about packing bags and making checklists. It's about sleeping masks and extra rolls of toilet paper. It's about more comfort and less stress. It's about so much more.

And it's about more than a race because all the advice, tips, and earned wisdom that Coach Bennett shares during the episode can be used for a big day or an important meeting or a presentation or exam.

Because this is about running... and this is not about running.

Some links for you to freak out about (freak out in a good way):

Watch U2 perform With Or Without You at the Sphere in Las Vegas (watch the whole video... you will not be let down.

Listen to my fantastic playlist of great U2 songs (there are many, many more great U2 songs that are not on the playlist too)

Check out all some of the Nike Running events that are taking place in Chicago for marathon weekend.

Check out the always impressive mindset coach tammie bennett

 Check out and get info about how to join the great Show Up Society community

Follow Nike Running on Instagram as they cover the Chicago Marathon

Cheers,
Coach Bennett

Send us a message

Be sure to send any and all questions and comments to the mailbag:

Coach Bennett’s Podcast

item.itunes:summary: Ep. 17: What You Need To Start This is episode is for everyone. Because this episode is about what you need to start, start over, or start running again. And I bet you'll be surprised that it's less than you thought and that you have more of what you need than you think. This is a good one... so get ready to be inspired and motivated and excited. We've also got another Mindset Minute with coach tammie of The Show Up Society and we even break out the mail bag again for a really moving l...
item.description:
Ep. 17:  What You Need To Start

This is episode is for everyone. Because this episode is about what you need to start, start over, or start running again. And I bet you'll be surprised that it's less than you thought and that you have more of what you need than you think. This is a good one... so get ready to be inspired and motivated and excited. We've also got another Mindset Minute with coach tammie of The Show Up Society and we even break out the mail bag again for a really moving letter from the UK.

Thank you for listening... and for subscribing to the podcast... and for sharing the podcast with everyone you know... and for leaving a great comment so the one comment that the guy left about me rambling too much gets diminished by your rave 5 star review... and thank you for listening to the same podcast episodes not once but two or three or four times.

Cheers,
Coach Bennett

Here are a few links for you to enjoy:

Watch INXS rip through What You Need at Wembley Stadium in 1991

Check out coach tammie and the Show Up Society Community

Read the latest Coach Bennett's Newsletter - It's Great To Be A Runnerd

item.title: How Being A Better Teammate Makes You A Better Runner.
item.itunes:summary: Episode 16: How Being A Better Teammate Makes You A Better Runner. They can be your greatest source of strength or your greatest weakness. Teammates. And if you want to be the best you can be out there on the roads and trails and track and off them as well... then you need to be the best teammate you can be to others and to yourself. Coach Bennett breaks down why becoming a better teammate leads to better running. There is also our first Mindset Minute with Mindset Coach tammie bennett...
item.description:
Episode 16: How Being A Better Teammate Makes You A Better Runner.

They can be your greatest source of strength or your greatest weakness. Teammates. And if you want to be the best you can be out there on the roads and trails and track and off them as well... then you need to be the best teammate you can be to others and to yourself. Coach Bennett breaks down why becoming a better teammate leads to better running. There is also our first  Mindset Minute with Mindset Coach tammie bennett (yes, she still loves lower case letters) and some talk about the Pre Classic and the Sea Hear Now Festival where Coach Bennett rocked his proverbial socks off. This is not only an important episode... it's a really important episode. Is that redundant?
Yes. But it's still true and it's true.

Cheers and thank you for listening... and sharing... and subscribing!

Coach Bennett

Here's a few links for you to enjoy:

check out mindset coach extraordinaire tammie bennett

item.description:
Episode 15:  Bad Advice For Runners

Who would have thought that Coach Bennett had so much awful advice? Well, he does! And he can't wait to share some of it with you. The key here is that Coach is going to let you know ahead of time that's terrible advice and tell you why. That way you can learn from all this miserable advice what not to do! You may even learn what to do! Bonus! This is a fun episode. Thank you for listening.
Cheers!

A few ideas and links:

Want some more bad advice? Try the Worst Advice Ever audio guided run on Nike Run Club App

Be a fan of YOUR sport and check out all the details for the Diamond League Final which is taking place at  the Prefontaine Classic. You do not want to miss this Track & Field meet!

Check out the latest episode of the Two Coach Bennetts Talking podcast...
listen here on apple podcasts
or
listen here on spotify 

Send us a message

item.description:
014. Mindset Matters!

This is a big episode for Coach Bennett's Podcast because, well, mindset matters but also because we have our FIRST GUEST! That's right! Coach tammie bennett (she loves lower case letters) is the first guest EVER on Coach Bennett's Podcast. Coach tammie is a certified mindset coach, educator and host of the show up society podcast. On this episode, coach tammie talks about the importance of mindset and gives us a method for choosing better outcomes. Told ya it was a big episode. Hope you love it and I know you'll get something truly beneficial and instantly useful from listening. And be sure to check out the links below on how you can learn more about coach tammie.

Cheers,
Coach Bennett

Check out these great links inspired by this episode

Listen to Coach tammie on her Show Up Society website

You can also follow tammie on Instagram here

Listen to the Show Up Society Podcast on Apple here

Listen to the Show Up Society Podcast on Spotify here

Listen to coach tammie on the Two Coach Bennetts Talking Podcast here

Watch an epic (and completely out of control and dangerous) cheese wheel race here

item.description:
013. I Make The Case For You To Race

Coach Bennett presents his case for YOU to race in this super fun episode... Episode 13. Sit back or run forward or maybe even drive or ride along as Coach shares point after point as to why he believes racing is for everyone (and that includes YOU). Then you get to decide the verdict. Coach also talks about Jaws because, well, Jaws is one of the most awesome movies ever! That's why! So much more is covered in this episode I guess you'll just need to listen to it. Thank you for sharing some of your time and cheers to you for listening to Coach Bennett's Podcast. 

Cheers,
Coach Bennett

013. I Make The Case For You To Race

Coach Bennett presents his case for YOU to race in this super fun episode... Episode 13. Sit back or run forward or maybe even drive or ride along as Coach shares point after point as to why he believes racing is for everyone (and that includes YOU). Then you get to decide the verdict. Coach also talks about Jaws because, well, Jaws is one of the most awesome movies ever! That's why! So much more is covered in this episode I guess you'll just need to listen to it. Thank you for sharing some of your time and cheers to you for listening to Coach Bennett's Podcast. 

Cheers,
Coach Bennett

item.itunes:summary: 012. Let Your Effort Lead Your Run On this episode of Coach Bennett's Podcast it's almost all about effort. Because there is actually more than just effort that's talked about! The Coach Bennett Jersey Shore Running Tour is in full effect, the phrase "home is where the heart is" is broken down, there's even a hint that wings and pizza will be spoken about (be prepared to be let down... Coach forgets to talk about both wings and pizza) and then of course... the topic of effort is discussed. ...
item.description:
012. Let Your Effort Lead Your Run

On this episode of Coach Bennett's Podcast it's almost all about effort. Because there is actually more than just effort that's talked about! The Coach Bennett Jersey Shore Running Tour is in full effect, the phrase "home is where the heart is" is broken down, there's even a hint that wings and pizza will be spoken about (be prepared to be let down... Coach forgets to talk about both wings and pizza) and then of course... the topic of effort is discussed.

Enjoy the episode and thank you for listening!

Some links for your pleasure:

Thompson Park

Holmdel Park

Manasquan Reservoir

Bruce Springtseen (didn't talk about the Boss but you should listen to him anyway)

Cheers,  

Coach Bennett

item.itunes:title: The Speed Run
item.title: The Speed Run
item.itunes:summary: 011. The Speed Run. Ready... set... GO! It's time to talk about the speed run! That's right. It's scary. It's fast. It's wild. It's challenging. It's exciting. It's fartlek, long intervals, hills, tempo runs, and short intervals. It's all the Speed Run! And the speed run is about more than just the speed run. It's about the warm up and the stretching and the drills and the strides and... the recovery. But more than anything the speed run should be about fun. So join Coach Bennett and learn ab...
item.description:
011. The Speed Run. Ready... set... GO! It's time to talk about the speed run! That's right. It's scary. It's fast. It's wild. It's challenging. It's exciting. It's fartlek, long intervals, hills, tempo runs, and short intervals. It's all the Speed Run! And the speed run is about more than just the speed run. It's about the warm up and the stretching and the drills and the strides and... the recovery. But more than anything the speed run should be about fun. So join Coach Bennett and learn about the infinite variety of ways you can get faster and have fun doing it. Hope you enjoy and thank you for listening!
Cheers,
CB

item.itunes:title: The Recovery Run
item.title: The Recovery Run
item.itunes:summary: 010. The Recovery Run. It's also known as the easy run. And it's the most important run of them all. Why? Maybe it's because it's the run you do more than any other. Maybe it's because if you can nail the recovery run you will have a better chance at nailing all the other kinds of runs. Maybe it's because of what the dictionary defines as recovery. Maybe you just need to listen to Coach Bennett's Podcast to find out. Cheers, Coach Bennett Check out the links to these people and...
item.description:
010. The Recovery Run.  It's also known as the easy run. And it's the most important run of them all. Why? Maybe it's because it's the run you do more than any other. Maybe it's because if you can nail the recovery run you will have a better chance at nailing all the other kinds of runs. Maybe it's because of what the dictionary defines as recovery. Maybe you just need to listen to Coach Bennett's Podcast to find out. 

Cheers,
Coach Bennett

item.content:encoded:
010. The Recovery Run.  It's also known as the easy run. And it's the most important run of them all. Why? Maybe it's because it's the run you do more than any other. Maybe it's because if you can nail the recovery run you will have a better chance at nailing all the other kinds of runs. Maybe it's because of what the dictionary defines as recovery. Maybe you just need to listen to Coach Bennett's Podcast to find out. 

Cheers,
Coach Bennett

item.itunes:title: The Long Run
item.title: The Long Run
item.itunes:summary: 009. The Long Run. Those three words inspire a whole host of different feelings for different people. And that's why Episode 9 is dedicated to... The Long Run. What is a long run? Why do we do long runs? How can we make them better... less boring... greater fun... and more challenging? I hope you're not expecting me to answer all those questions here! That's what the podcast is for. And in an odd coincidence The Long Run episode just happens to be the longest Coach Bennett's Podca...
item.description:
009. The Long Run. Those three words inspire a whole host of different feelings for different people.  And that's why Episode 9 is dedicated to... The Long Run. What is a long run? Why do we do long runs? How can we make them better... less boring... greater fun...  and more challenging? I hope you're not expecting me to answer all those questions here! That's what the podcast is for. And in an odd coincidence The Long Run episode just happens to be the longest Coach Bennett's Podcast... so far. Hope you enjoy the show and thank you for listening... and for sharing the podcast... and thank you for subscribing... and for rating and reviewing the show.

Cheers,
Coach Bennett

Here are a few links to the books I just finished or just started reading:

Wool by Hugh Howey

Robert E. Lee and Me by Ty Seidule

item.itunes:title: Embrace Your Weaknesses
item.title: Embrace Your Weaknesses
item.itunes:summary: 008. Embrace your weaknesses. That's right! Get in close and give all those weaknesses of yours a great big squeezy hug. Don't ignore those weaknesses of yours. Don't pretend they don't exist. And don't put them in a corner with baby because nobody puts baby in a corner. And if you can embrace your weaknesses you can own them, you can know them, you can learn about them, you can work on them. And you will get better as a result. Not just at running either. This is about running......
item.description:
008. Embrace your weaknesses. That's right! Get in close and give all those weaknesses of yours a great big squeezy hug. Don't ignore those weaknesses of yours. Don't pretend they don't exist. And don't put them in a corner with baby because nobody puts baby in a corner.  And if you can embrace your weaknesses you can own them, you can know them, you can learn about them,  you can work on them. And you will get better as a result. Not just at running either. This is about running... and this is not about running. Join Coach Bennett on this episode and learn why Embrace Your Weaknesses has always been a part of his coaching philosophy. Enjoy the show. Episode 8 is great.

PS. Attention Swifties... Taylor Swift is and her concert in Seattle is discussed. Don't worry... TS gets lauded.

Here are some links worth checking out...

Sinead O'Connor - I Do Not Want What I Haven't Got  - on Spotify (listen with headphones... best way to experience the glory that this album is.)

The official website of the greatest state... New Jersey

Taylor Swift Seattle Concert Video

Cheers,
CB

item.content:encoded:
008. Embrace your weaknesses. That's right! Get in close and give all those weaknesses of yours a great big squeezy hug. Don't ignore those weaknesses of yours. Don't pretend they don't exist. And don't put them in a corner with baby because nobody puts baby in a corner.  And if you can embrace your weaknesses you can own them, you can know them, you can learn about them,  you can work on them. And you will get better as a result. Not just at running either. This is about running... and this is not about running. Join Coach Bennett on this episode and learn why Embrace Your Weaknesses has always been a part of his coaching philosophy. Enjoy the show. Episode 8 is great.

PS. Attention Swifties... Taylor Swift is and her concert in Seattle is discussed. Don't worry... TS gets lauded.

Here are some links worth checking out...

Sinead O'Connor - I Do Not Want What I Haven't Got  - on Spotify (listen with headphones... best way to experience the glory that this album is.)

The official website of the greatest state... New Jersey

Taylor Swift Seattle Concert Video

Cheers,
CB

007. Every run has a purpose. In fact, every run has many purposes! Join Coach Bennett as he talks about one of the fundamental pillars of his coaching philosophy. And you better believe that this episode is about running... and this episode is not about running. The episode kicks off with a discussion on how to run (or not run) in hot and humid or dangerous conditions. The mail bag is opened. And so much more is covered that it just seems silly to write it all down here when you can just listen to it!

Some links worth checking out:

Have fun nerding out on these links.

Cheers and thank you for listening!

And this episode has so much more: - Coach Bennett talks about his weekend at the US Track & Field Championships - How getting better at some of the essentials of life can lead you to better runs - What does Cast Away (yeah, the great Tom Hanks movie) have to do with better running? - Skateboarding, wate...
item.description:
006. Can you get better at running while you're not running? Absolutely yes! Don't believe me? Listen to this episode because I share a whole bunch of ways you can do just that! And this episode has so much more:

 - Coach Bennett talks about his weekend at the US Track & Field Championships

- How getting better at some of the essentials of life can lead you to better runs

- What does Cast Away (yeah, the great Tom Hanks movie) have to do with better running?

- Skateboarding, water skiing and Jaws 3 all make it into Episode 6 too somehow

- Will there be time for the mail bag this episode? You'll have to listen to find out

How To Start Join Coach Bennett for a fantastic episode about how to start... running... but you know that this podcast is about running and this podcast is not about running. By the end of Episode 5 you'll have learned: *What the real purpose of a first run is *Why measuring success as many ways as you can is such an essential ingredient to every great running journey *How celebration plays such an important role to an athletes success *Why mixing things up keeps the ru...
item.description:
005. How To Start

Join Coach Bennett for a fantastic episode about how to start... running... but you know that this podcast is about running and this podcast is not about running.  By the end of  Episode 5 you'll have learned:

*What the real purpose of a first run is

*Why measuring success as many ways as you can is such an essential ingredient to every great running journey

*How celebration plays such an important role to an athletes success

*Why mixing things up keeps the runner fresh and keeps their running from going stale

*How being both a student and fan of the sport can help you truly enjoy the sport

And so much more!

The mailbag (find the address below)  is overflowing with letters and questions so we roll through some of those too. There are a few rambles here and there but we always get where we need to be.

Cheers and thank you for listening!

Coach Bennett

Also be sure to also check out:

Follow Coach Bennett on THREADS

Citius Magazine US T&F Champs Throws, Jumps and Multis Preview

Citius Magazine US T&F Champs Sprints Races Preview

item.itunes:summary: 004. Maybe You Can't Means Maybe You Can Join Coach Bennett on this great episode and learn: *A little bit about the Oregon weather... it's more exciting than it sounds. Okay, exciting may be too strong a word. *The epic and epically long 80's and 90's mixtape playlists Coach has created. *The books and tv show that are currently being imbibed by Coach. *Why every great goal or journey needs an element of maybe I can't and more importantly why maybe I can't also means maybe I can. item.description:
004. Maybe You Can't Means Maybe You Can

Join Coach Bennett on this great episode and learn:

*A little bit about the Oregon weather... it's more exciting than it sounds. Okay, exciting may be too strong a word.

*The epic and epically long 80's and 90's mixtape playlists Coach has created.

*The books and tv show that are currently being imbibed by Coach.

*Why every great goal or journey needs an element of maybe I can't and more importantly why maybe I can't also means maybe I can. And those are some great odds you should always be willing to take.

*And so much more!

Enjoy the episode and thank you for listening!

Cheers,

Coach Bennett

Also be sure to check out:

The Bear Season 2 on Hulu

Coach Bennett on Good Reads

Coach Bennett's 90's For The Win Mixtape on Spotify

Join Coach for episode 3 and learn... - Why is Coach Bennett recording this podcast in a bathroom... in a hotel room... in Naperville, Illinois - What Wildwood Running PDX is all about and some of the great work they are doing for the young girls in the sport of XC and T&F and the coaches that guide them - Some of the things you need to think about in order to know whether you are ready to sign up for a half marathon - Why perfect ...
item.description:
003. You know what sucks? Perfect sucks. Join Coach  for episode 3 and learn...

- Why is Coach Bennett recording this podcast in a bathroom... in a hotel room... in Naperville,  Illinois

- What Wildwood Running PDX is all about and some of the great work they are doing for the young girls in the sport of XC and T&F and the coaches that guide them

- Some of the things you need to think about in order to know whether you are ready to sign up for a half marathon

- Why perfect does indeed suck

-And so much more!

Also be sure to check out:

Perfect Sucks from Coach Bennett's Newsletter

Wildwood Running

Show Up Society (Tammie Bennett)

Heidi Strickler MS RD CSSD

Coach Mahesh Narayanan of North Central College Womens XC & TF

Coach Dan Iverson of Naperville North

The City of Naperville

item.itunes:summary: 002. Welcome to the starting line... on this episode Coach Bennett talks about - what took so long for this podcast to become a reality. Hint: He stood nervously on starting line for a long, long, long time - the allergy capital that is Eugene, Oregon - how to butter up pancakes - why being nervous can be a great reminder of something great - why being uncomfortable is an important part of life - the benefits of writing about yourself - what the purpose of a fir...
item.description:
002. Welcome to the starting line... on this episode Coach Bennett talks about

- what took so long for this podcast to become a reality.
      Hint: He stood nervously on starting line for a long, long, long time
- the allergy capital that is Eugene, Oregon
- how to butter up pancakes
- why being nervous can be a great reminder of something great
 - why being uncomfortable is an important part of life
- the benefits of writing about yourself
- what the purpose of a first run is and how to do one the right way
- and so much more

Check out:
The Original Pancake House
Nike Outdoor Nationals
How To Do Your First Run

-  the electric running scene there and the Mayor of Miami Running Frankie Ruiz 
- thunderstorms. Love 'em just don't run in 'em
- humidity demands your respect

And there is so much more. You just need to listen to get it all!

item.description:
Welcome to Coach Bennett's Podcast! This is the starting line... beginning... the genesis... the alpha... the first episode. Actually it's episode 0.

Listen in as Coach Bennett talks about what this podcast is going to be. 

Get ready to laugh, cry (in a good way), be inspired and motivated and have an all-around good time. 

As always, this is about running and this is not about running. 

Send us a message

Be sure to send any and all questions and comments to the mailbag:

Coach Bennett’s Podcast

9220 SW Barbur Blvd STE 119, #322 Portland, Oregon 97219

Be sure to check out the Two Coach Bennetts Merch Store for t-shirts, hoodies, coffee mugs, pint glasses and more! - https://twocoachbennetts.com/merch

And if you need even more Coach Bennett in your life you can scratch that itch by subscribing to the Coach Bennett’s Newsletter.

item.content:encoded:
Welcome to Coach Bennett's Podcast! This is the starting line... beginning... the genesis... the alpha... the first episode. Actually it's episode 0.

Listen in as Coach Bennett talks about what this podcast is going to be. 

Get ready to laugh, cry (in a good way), be inspired and motivated and have an all-around good time. 

As always, this is about running and this is not about running. 

Send us a message

Be sure to send any and all questions and comments to the mailbag:

Coach Bennett’s Podcast

9220 SW Barbur Blvd STE 119, #322 Portland, Oregon 97219

Be sure to check out the Two Coach Bennetts Merch Store for t-shirts, hoodies, coffee mugs, pint glasses and more! - https://twocoachbennetts.com/merch
